epic: Phase CFA — Cluster Full Authority Rollout
owner: Tariq (standing approval for autonomous CFA loop — 2026-07-09)
operationalMode: AUTONOMOUS — Ralph runs CFA-N end-to-end (branch → tests → push → PR → CI → merge → CFA-N+1) without per-story approval, gated by the 10 auto-merge conditions and the 11 hard-stop conditions documented in scripts/ralph/CLAUDE.md.

userStories.title: Core cluster_tree.manage + cluster_tree.export engine primitives
userStories.summary: Added two new rescue primitives (CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE, CLUSTER_TREE_EXPORT) parallel to existing CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW. AccessDecision::clusterTreeRescueApplies now checks the list of three. Same ancestor walk + scoped-role grant + sensitive-target floor. 19 new tests + 77 regression pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Both primitives require scoped role on actor.org (no is_admin_role shortcut)
Neither primitive implies the other or a module capability
auth/me surfaces the three primitives via CoreCapabilityProvider

userStories.title: KPI cluster export widening via KPIS_EXPORT + CLUSTER_TREE_EXPORT
userStories.summary: Added Capability::KPIS_EXPORT constant. KpiController::export rewired. UserKpiScope::clusterVisibleOrgIds gained a 'purpose' parameter (view | export) — each fires its own primitive pair. Backward-compat: same-org export still accepts KPIS_VIEW.
acceptanceCriteria: Read pair (KPIS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW) does NOT widen export
Export pair does NOT widen read

userStories.title: Strategy cluster_tree.manage widening for governance writes
userStories.summary: PortfolioPolicy::changeStrategicStatus, forceClose, managePriority, assignOwner all get CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE rescue paired with the matching STRATEGY_* module capability. BlockerPolicy::resolve + escalate get STRATEGY_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE rescue. ProgramPolicy::linkProject stays strict same-org per CFA-00 owner decision. CRUD (update/delete/create) unchanged. 20 new tests + 57 regression pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio governance writes cluster-widen via module cap + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
Blocker resolve/escalate cluster-widens via STRATEGY_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE

userStories.title: Projects cluster read + status writes + sanitized show
userStories.summary: UserProjectScope::clusterVisibleOrgIds widening for view. ProjectPolicy::view two-path rescue. ProjectPolicy::update rescue for status / PDCA transitions via PROJECTS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE. SANITIZE ProjectResource show (strip or per-child gate the eager-loaded members / stakeholders / tasks / milestones / expenses / kpis / risks / comments / attachments / activity_log). NO project role/member assignment widening (CFA-00 decision).
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with PROJECTS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org projects in index
Parent org user can show child org project with same pair
Project status / PDCA transition widens via PROJECTS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
Project member/role assignment stays strict same-org
Sanitized ProjectResource show — no members / stakeholders / tasks / expenses / activity_log leakage

userStories.title: Risks cluster read + reassess/status writes + export gate
userStories.summary: UserRiskScope::clusterVisibleOrgIds widening. RiskPolicy::view rescue. RiskPolicy::reassess + changeStatus rescue via RISKS_REASSESS + RISKS_CHANGE_STATUS + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE. RiskDashboardController::export gated by RISKS_VIEW_REPORTS + CLUSTER_TREE_EXPORT.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with RISKS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org risks
Reassess / changeStatus widen via module cap + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
RiskAction write widening stays strict same-org OR deferred

userStories.title: Meetings cluster read + governance writes (Direction R/B integrity)
userStories.summary: UserMeetingScope::clusterVisibleOrgIds widening. MeetingPolicy::view + RecommendationPolicy::view rescue. MeetingPolicy::update rescue for start/complete/cancel via MEETINGS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE. RecommendationPolicy approve/reject/defer/accept/complete rescue. Direction R/B integrity preserved. Self-approval block preserved. Attendees + internal_comments sanitized for cluster read.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with MEETINGS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org meetings
Parent org user with RECOMMENDATIONS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org recommendations
Meeting start/complete/cancel widens via MEETINGS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
Recommendation approve/reject/defer widens via RECOMMENDATIONS_* + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
Direction B (recommendations ruling + action_item) integrity preserved
Attendees with emails sanitized for cluster read
userStories.riskLevel: HIGH — Direction R/B integrity is critical. STOP and require Tariq review if any resolution lifecycle or recommendation approval deviates from current behavior.

userStories.title: Users cluster limited directory (HIGH PII)
userStories.summary: UserDirectoryResource with strict field whitelist (id, name, email, organization_id, department_id, job_title, is_active ONLY). UserPolicy::view rescue for directory endpoint. UserController::show returns sanitized directory shape for cluster actors (NEVER exposes password / tokens / 2FA / security fields / employee_personal_info / login_attempts). NO write widening. NO role assignment widening. STOP if any sensitive field leaks.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with USERS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org users in DIRECTORY shape
UserController::show returns sanitized directory shape for cluster actors (403 OR sanitized — never full PII)
UserDirectoryResource exposes ONLY the whitelisted fields
No password / tokens / 2FA / login_attempts / employee_personal_info leak
No write widening (CRUD stays strict same-org)
userStories.riskLevel: HIGH PII — DO NOT AUTO-MERGE. STOP and require Tariq review of UserDirectoryResource field whitelist before merge.

userStories.title: Tasks cluster read (DEFERRED — after CFA-09 OVR primitive)
userStories.summary: Add SensitivelyScoped marker to Task model so source_sensitivity='confidential' is engine-visible. UserTaskScope::clusterVisibleOrgIds widening. TaskPolicy::view rescue. PDCA transition writes via TASKS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE. Personal tasks (owner_id floor) bypass engine. Polymorphic source_type chain (Project / Department / Risk / IncidentReport / Recommendation / MeetingResolution / Kpi / Milestone). MUST follow CFA-09 because OVR source chain depends on OVR aggregate pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with TASKS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW sees child org tasks
PDCA transition widens via TASKS_EDIT + CLUSTER_TREE_MANAGE
Tasks sourced from confidential OVR incidents NOT cluster-visible (depends on CFA-09)
userStories.riskLevel: HIGH — polymorphic source chain + OVR confidential floor. STOP and require Tariq review.

userStories.title: OVR cluster aggregate reporting (NEVER raw)
userStories.summary: Build OvrClusterDashboardController (or extend OvrIncidentController::stats) returning COUNT / severity / status aggregates per descendant org. Gated by OVR_VIEW_STATISTICS + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW. Raw incident read endpoints NEVER cluster-widen. IncidentReport::is_confidential SensitivelyScoped floor is FINAL.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate statistics endpoint widens via OVR_VIEW_STATISTICS + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW
Raw incident index/show endpoints NEVER cluster-widen
Patient name / file number (encrypted) never exposed cross-cluster
CSV/PDF export — aggregate only, never raw
userStories.riskLevel: CRITICAL — patient data. STOP and require Tariq review of aggregate SQL.

userStories.title: Surveys aggregate reporting (NEVER raw responses)
userStories.summary: Build SurveyClusterDashboardController returning response COUNT / completion_rate / aggregate_score per descendant org. Gated by SURVEYS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW. Raw response read endpoints NEVER cluster-widen. survey_responses.respondent_email + respondent_phone encryption upgrade is a SEPARATE migration story — out of CFA scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate statistics endpoint widens via SURVEYS_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW
userStories.riskLevel: HIGH — respondent identity. STOP and require Tariq review of aggregate SQL.

userStories.title: ActivityLog cluster audit role + IP/UA redaction upgrade
userStories.summary: Tighten ActivityLogResource to redact top-level ip_address + user_agent to CIDR / hashed form. ActivityLogController::export gated by AUDIT_EXPORT + CLUSTER_TREE_EXPORT for cluster_auditor role only. Cluster audit role is SEPARATE from cluster PMO role. cross-module index risk (loggable polymorphic).
acceptanceCriteria: ip_address + user_agent redacted at top level (CIDR / family hash)
Cluster audit role: AUDIT_VIEW + AUDIT_EXPORT + CLUSTER_TREE_VIEW + CLUSTER_TREE_EXPORT
Cluster PMO role does NOT have audit access
userStories.riskLevel: HIGH — cross-module index. STOP and require Tariq review.

nonGoals: CRUD widening outside documented governance writes
Tasks cluster widening before CFA-09 OVR primitive
AccessDecision change unless story explicitly allows
stopConditions: CI fails twice on the same story
AccessDecision change needed outside story's documented scope
Migration needed outside story's documented scope
PII / raw sensitive data risk discovered
Write path widened outside story's documented scope
Direction R / Direction B integrity violation
Any CFA story with riskLevel=HIGH/CRITICAL — STOP regardless of CI
stopReportFormat:

- Files involved:
- Current behavior:
- Expected behavior:
- Why this cannot proceed safely:
- Proposed options:
- Recommended option:
mergeApproval: AUTONOMOUS — Tariq standing approval for CFA stories 2026-07-09. Per-story approval REMOVED between CFA-N and CFA-N+1 when all 10 auto-merge conditions hold. Hard stops only on the 11 conditions listed.
